creator: miwi@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi Diego, 

Please rework this port new. 

1). portlint -AC failed 

2.) you should please reread the porterbook here gives many mistakes. 
The mixing with qt3/qt4 is wrong. 
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/ 

3.) build failed here. 
[23:21] root@miwi /home/miwi/dev/ports/multimedia/smplayer# make 
===>  Extracting for smplayer-0.5.0 => MD5 Checksum OK for 
smplayer-0.5.0.tar.gz.  => SHA256 Checksum OK for 
smplayer-0.5.0.tar.gz.  ===>  Patching for smplayer-0.5.0 ===> 
smplayer-0.5.0 depends on executable in : cmake - found ===> 
smplayer-0.5.0 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/moc - found ===> 
smplayer-0.5.0 depends on executable in : gmake - found ===> 
smplayer-0.5.0 depends on shared library: kimproxy - found ===> 
Configuring for smplayer-0.5.0 ===>  Building for smplayer-0.5.0 
gmake: *** No rule to make target `all'.  Stop.  *** Error code 
2 

Stop in /usr/home/miwi/dev/ports/multimedia/smplayer. 

4.) Please show in other ports for sorting the Makefile. 

5.) Is a new version out 0.5.0 

Thanks Martin
